name: danielshort-website
description: Simple tests for Daniel Short's website

scripts.test: node test.js && node tests/project-starfall-monster-sheet-processor.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-skill-fx-runtime.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-skill-fx-quality.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-bundle.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-visual-viewport.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-enemy-fx-uniqueness.test.js && node tests/aws-credentials.test.js && node tests/aws-data-migrations.test.js && node tests/chatbot-stream-proxy.test.js && node tests/tools-auth-session.test.js && node tests/job-application-copilot-bridge.test.js && node tests/job-application-tracker-attachments.test.js && npm --prefix aws/job-application-tracker test && npm run test:extension && node build/validate-seo.js
scripts.test:starfall: npm run test:starfall:smoke && npm run test:starfall:systems && npm run test:starfall:eclipse && npm run test:starfall:combat && npm run test:starfall:progression && npm run test:starfall:inventory && npm run test:starfall:balance
scripts.test:starfall:systems: node test.js --suite=starfall-systems && node tests/project-starfall-professional-hud.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-fractured-frontier.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-thornpath-fracture-canopy.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-frostfen-marsh-run.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-crossing-identity.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-bandit-ridge-map.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-rustcoil-orrery-circuit.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-map-transition-safety.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-rift-mutations.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-rift-counterplay.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-rift-operations.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-combat-feedback.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-player-feel.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-enemy-readability.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-rift-lantern-telegraph.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-guided-first-expedition.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-class-picker.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-boss-response.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-boss-response-feedback.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-touch-controls.test.js
scripts.test:starfall:progression: node test.js --suite=starfall-progression && node tests/project-starfall-early-loot-gating.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-quest-handoff.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-recurring-loop.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-fracture-directives.test.js && npm run test:starfall:rift-imprints
scripts.test:starfall:bundle: node tests/project-starfall-bundle.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-visual-viewport.test.js && node tests/project-starfall-enemy-fx-uniqueness.test.js && npm run test:starfall:skill-fx
scripts.test:starfall:full: npm run test:starfall && npm run test:starfall:assets && npm run test:starfall:bundle
